PowerShell(foreach \($p in 3306,27017,9092,9411,8083\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output \("{0,-6} {1}" -f $p, $\(if\($c\){'UP'}else{'--'}\)\) })
